---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem in a skill, template, eval, or repository workflow
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly.

## Affected skill

Which skill is affected? Example: `doc-yet`

## Expected behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what happened instead.

## Reproduction

1. Steps to reproduce
2. Commands used
3. Relevant repository structure if applicable

## Additional context

Add logs, screenshots, or references if useful.
